Yanni Skirt

Yanni Skirt

Black / 6. / Organza Bouquet

Brooklyn

Pickup available, usually ready in 24 hours

Free Ground shipping on Domestic Orders

Mid-length skirt cut from sheer organza layered over crepe. Features a straight silhouette with a delicately crafted, hand-applied surface of floral motifs. Each motif is handcrafted in India using flower beads, round beads, bugle beads, and stone chains, assembled with care and precision by skilled artisans. Embellishments are concentrated at the hem and interspersed across the skirt for a richly textured finish. Designed to sit at the natural waist with a simple waistband and clean back.

  • Concealed zip closure at side
  • Fully lined
Details
  • 100% Nylon
  • Made in India
  • 261W-555-F1872

Need more information? Contact us

Shipping and Returns
  • Free Ground shipping on Domestic Orders.
  • $10 International Shipping
  • Returns: You may return or exchange your item(s) within 14 days of the order date.
  • Final sale items cannot be returned or exchanged.
  • Return Policy

Mid-length skirt cut from sheer organza layered over crepe. Features a straight silhouette with a delicately crafted, hand-applied surface of floral motifs. Each motif is handcrafted in India using flower beads, round beads, bugle beads, and stone chains, assembled with care and precision by skilled artisans. Embellishments are concentrated at the hem and interspersed across the skirt for a richly textured finish. Designed to sit at the natural waist with a simple waistband and clean back.

  • Concealed zip closure at side
  • Fully lined
